dashboards_data.name: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics V2
dashboards_data.description: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics V2 — Command of the Message aligned.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases  
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases




| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases





| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "CRITICAL" or severity = "HIGH"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(data_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools

dataset = cases   
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment  = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases

| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases



| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by data_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = total_alerts

dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "CRITICAL" or severity = "HIGH"
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by data_source
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_lag_seconds

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp count(alert_id) as alert_count, avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms by data_source
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| fields data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds
| sort desc avg_lag_seconds
| limit 20

widgets_data.title: Cases Auto Resolved
widgets_data.description: This includes deduping (Palo SOC Framework), auto triage, and auto-resolution by XSIAM

data.phrase:
dataset = cases   
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment  = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases

| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Critical Alerts by Source
widgets_data.description: Critical+High severity alerts grouped by vendor data source (DS: tag).

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "CRITICAL" or severity = "HIGH"
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by data_source
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "CRITICAL" or severity = "HIGH"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases





| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Avg Alert Ingestion Lag (sec)
widgets_data.description: Average delay (seconds) from event capture (_time) to alert record creation (alert_arrival_timestamp), across all DS-tagged sources.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_lag_seconds

dataset = cases  
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases




| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Security Tools Integrated
widgets_data.description: Distinct vendor data sources (DS: tags) emitting alerts.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(data_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools

widgets_data.description: Alert count grouped by vendor data source (DS: tag).

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by data_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = total_alerts

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"

widgets_data.title: Top 20 Slowest Data Sources
widgets_data.description: Twenty slowest data sources by average alert ingestion lag. Columns: data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp count(alert_id) as alert_count, avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms by data_source
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| fields data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds
| sort desc avg_lag_seconds
| limit 20

name: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics V2
